prompt: Use the exact same face from the reference image and generate a picture, captured mid-exhale a thick stream of white smoke pouring from slightly parted lips, catching a single narrow beam of warm amber key light in an otherwise black environment. Ultra photorealistic, 8K, no text overlays, cinematic color grading.
